visa_types.documents_required:
- Checklist for Tourism visa for EU/EEA family member
Please bring a set of photocopy document in A4 size paper to reduce your submission time at the center
- Checklist for Family Reunion visa for EU/EEA citizen family member
- Invitation format (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/zmr1FM7AJWQE9pLQOHsfQ/52b540b015196a4afc70f6bc673b760b/invitationformat-080415.pdf)
- Sample of Family Certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6yw2E5mkDI8cHDBkliRWSk/b11348a5c53e15160c3242b80774fa66/family-certificate-250414.pdf)
- Sample of Marriage certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7ABtWLWNCIK3baGBv9psv7/b5373e9366791016dc44531b00ba4563/marriage-certificate-250414.pdf)
- Sample of Marriage Affidavit (For Hindu & Buddhist religious) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/67yuJH5o0Oksg1HvKtntKz/39b38631aba32fef0ead10d71f7c0ddf/marriage-affidavit-250414.pdf)
Special  Note: Passport must be valid for 6 months from the date submission. Attached checklist will be updated soon 
INSTRUCTION FOR PREPARING DOCUMENTATION
- Name, Father’s name, Date of birth should be same in all documents. NO exception will be acceptable.
- Prepare a Family certificate according to the format instructed by the embassy. The certificate should be issued by the name of head of the family. All immediate family members name
                                                                            to be included in the certificate, immediate family includes husband, wife, and children. All relationship to be mentioned clearly. All address in the certificate should be actual
                                                                            and all seals should be clearly visible.
- Marriage solemnized date (12 no column of NikahNama) & Marriage registration date (24 no column of NikahNama) should be mentioned in Marriage certificate. Volume no, page no,
                                                                            serial. No. should available in Marriage certificate and
- Nikahnama Bangla & English (All original).
- In case of 2nd marriage; the applicant has to provide necessary first marriage documentation of previous wedding
- Note:
- Family certificate should include all alive family members. Current address should be match with supporting documents of each member. Certificate should be issued by the name
                                                                                    of head of the applicant.
- Marriage certificate should be signed by Kazi with signature. Issue and signing by Kazi should be same.
- All Bangladeshi Certificate have to be attested by Ministry of foreign affairs.
- All pages of all the passports of husband/wife must be submitted (Photocopy).If any passport lost; lost declaration from Bangladesh High Commission in Italy or GD from Police
                                                                                    Station in Italy is required.

- Marriage certificate, Nikhanama Bangla & English (Muslim), marriage affidavit (Hindu & Buddhist, original National ID card/passport copy of priest to show) ,marriage
                                                                                    certificate  from church (Christian).
- All certificates have to be as per embassy guideline.  All Bangladeshi certificates have to be attested from ministry of foreign affairs.
- Guideline for Certificates and formats:
- Family Certificate:
- Certificate should be issued by head of the family name.
- In case of head of the family is expired, certificate will be issued by the name of next senior member and late member’s name has to be included in the certificate.
- Sequence of family members name would be from senior to junior.
- Relationship to be specified as the relationship among certifying person and other family member as if father is the head of the family, certificate will be issued by father’s
                                                                            name and in the relationship row, father will be specified as ‘Father’, accordingly ‘Son’, ‘Daughter’.
- One certificate will not contain two family’s information. Such as, if grandchild and grandmother apply together, they will have two different family certificates, issued by
                                                                            individual head of the family.
- Address in the certificate should be correct, as if any of the family member holds Italian residence ship but currently stays in Bangladesh, his/her address should be in Italy.
- Marriage Certificate  & Nikahnama:
- Names details should be matched with other documents
- The dates of solemnized and registration to be corresponds in the both certificates
- Marriage Affidavit :(  Hindu Marriage)
- Names details should be matched with other documents
- Signature on the marriage Affidavit of husband and wife should be as per their passports.
- Signature of priest should be corresponds with his Identification document (National Id card/passport). The copy of identification document should be available with applicant to prove.
- Both husband’s and wife/s pictures should be attached on the affidavit paper and the authority seal to be on the picture, seal will cover half on the picture and other half
                                                                            on the paper.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa fee and VFS Global service charge is not applicable for the applicants who are dependent on EU/EEU citizen upon submitting necessary supporting document/s. In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge (inclusive of all taxes), as listed below.

[ita > bgd > en > Table:EU/EEA Citizen Family Member > Visa Fees 1]
Note: Visa fees and VFS Global Service Charge are not applicable to children up to the age of 6 years for only short stay visa (C type visa). Visa fee applicable for child between 6 to 12 years is 6300/-(45 Euro) Taka only for short stay visa (C-type visa). Please note that, VFS Global Service fee is waived when visa fee is waived by the embassy.
Biometric Data Capturing - All applicants applying for short stay Schengen Visa (C) visa are required to submit their Biometric Data.
Biometric Exemption- Children between 0 to 12 years old and applicants applying for long stay visa are exempted from giving fingerprints..
Logistic fee includes free SMS, e-mail notification, photocopy, photobooth
Exchange Rate is as per the current rate of exchange determined by the Embassy of Italy
Exchange rate - 1 Euro = 140 BDT
VFS service fee is inclusive 15% VAT

Overview
- Family member of EU/EEA citizen who wants visit their family member or willing to reunite with them in Italy.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- Family member of EU/EEA citizen who wants visit their family member or willing to reunite with them in Italy.

## Who should apply?
This visa is available to ordinary passport holders who live in Bangladesh, want to visit or accompany with their EU/EEA citizen family member in Italy.
- Wife / husband
- Father/ mother
- Father /mother in law
- Children less than 21 years old
- Children in law less than 21 years old

## Visa Fees
Visa fee and VFS Global service charge is not applicable for the applicants who are dependent on EU/EEU citizen upon submitting necessary supporting document/s. In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge (inclusive of all taxes), as listed below.

[ita > bgd > en > Table:EU/EEA Citizen Family Member > Visa Fees 1]
Note: Visa fees and VFS Global Service Charge are not applicable to children up to the age of 6 years for only short stay visa (C type visa). Visa fee applicable for child between 6 to 12 years is 6300/-(45 Euro) Taka only for short stay visa (C-type visa). Please note that, VFS Global Service fee is waived when visa fee is waived by the embassy.
Biometric Data Capturing - All applicants applying for short stay Schengen Visa (C) visa are required to submit their Biometric Data.
Biometric Exemption- Children between 0 to 12 years old and applicants applying for long stay visa are exempted from giving fingerprints..
Logistic fee includes free SMS, e-mail notification, photocopy, photobooth
Exchange Rate is as per the current rate of exchange determined by the Embassy of Italy
Exchange rate - 1 Euro = 140 BDT
VFS service fee is inclusive 15% VAT

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Tourism Visitor Visa
For applicants who wish to visit for sightseeing or visit friend/relative/family members and having conference in Italy, Malta and Slovakia. For Italy all applicants must schedule an appointment online through the official visa application website before submitting their documents. We strongly recommend submitting your application at least 45 days prior to your planned travel date

## *Who should apply?*
Ordinary passport holders reside in Bangladesh having intention of travelling to Italy, Malta and Slovakia.
Official passport holders and not being issued by note verbal from MOFA Bangladesh for having personal trip or being the employee of autonomous body.

## Visa Fees
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge per application , as listed below- 

[ita > bgd > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

Note: Visa fees and VFS Global Service Charge are not applicable to children up to the age of 6 years for only short stay visa (C type visa). Visa fee applicable for child between 6 to 12 years is 6300/-(45 Euro) Taka only for short stay visa (C-type visa). Please note that, VFS Global Service fee is waived when visa fee is waived by the embassy.
Biometric Data Capturing - All applicants applying for short stay Schengen Visa (C) visa are required to submit their Biometric Data.
Biometric Exemption- Children between 0 to 12 years old are exempted from giving fingerprints.
Logistic fee includes free SMS, e-mail notification, photocopy, photobooth,, form filling assistance
Exchange Rate is as per the current rate of exchange determined by the Embassy of Italy
Exchange rate - 1 Euro = 140
VFS Global service fee is 15% VAT inclusive

## Overview
Re Entry is a type of visa which is required by applicants who has lost/missed their entry permission to stay in Italy and willing to enter in Italy again for long stay.

## Who are eligible?
Applicant who had been living in Italy with valid long term staying permission (Soggirno/Carta D Identita) and now out of Italy for more than 12 months (Soggiorno holder) and 6 months
                                                                        (Carta D Identita holder) may need to apply for Re Entry visa to enter in Italy.
Re Entry visa application files will not be accepted if the visa application form is not completely filled up with correct information. Specially for the important part as clause no.
                                                                        29, 31 and 32 should be filled up with information not by not applicable.

## Visa Fees
In addition to the Visa Fees, applicant requires to pay the VFS Global Service Charge (inclusive of all taxes), as listed below.

Logistic fee includes free SMS, e-mail notification, photocopy, photobooth,, form filling assistance

visa_types.documents_required:
CHECKLIST AND SAMPLE DOCUMENTS FOR FAMILY RE-UNION VISA
Please bring a set of photocopy document in A4 size paper to reduce your submission time at the center
- Checklist for Family Re union visa
- Sample of Family Certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6yw2E5mkDI8cHDBkliRWSk/b11348a5c53e15160c3242b80774fa66/family-certificate-250414.pdf) (when applicant invited by spouse/parent)
- Sample of Family Certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/yjHSz5ZnMJcC5QDamPPFZ/3c9d9c13dd2e754f56eeb0484e59ba20/family-certificatechild-290616.pdf) (when applicant is invited by child)
- Sample of Marriage certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7ABtWLWNCIK3baGBv9psv7/b5373e9366791016dc44531b00ba4563/marriage-certificate-250414.pdf)
- Telephonic Marriage Certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3y6zPHxBbZbq7kIzMSepaq/3cd6f8158e643c7aae3d1445b3b387c2/telephonicemarriage-certificate-290616.pdf)
- Telephonic Marriage Declaration from Italy (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4yhwy5hMvStCvPaIVcFGDP/4f561f3c9e80b3c660b0da449122a6bb/telephonicomatrimonio-certificate-290616.pdf)
- Sample of Marriage Affidavit (For Hindu & Buddhist religious) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/67yuJH5o0Oksg1HvKtntKz/39b38631aba32fef0ead10d71f7c0ddf/marriage-affidavit-250414.pdf)
- Sample for Dependent certificate (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4gTdKpYu9zBKQZvwt46REH/da22d5613a22db95f27977ae4ef80c74/dependent-certificate-250414.pdf)
- Sample for Declaration (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Orolyh1hYVzdDUdjosSmL/e8610e3a2b65396e7250ddde367b1a8d/declarationsample.pdf)
- Sample for Affidavit of No objection (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/JmegH435tYViUPc5Tso21/7dbd0c1f4cf50e62d2d45406235bf0e0/affidavit-of-no-objection-250414.pdf)
- Sample for Guardian Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5ssW0mXPfBWfGCrQ8Jd8gO/0b61197add6a31884b5b93d26f54f9c8/guardian-letter-140116.pdf) Visa requesting letter from sponsor in Italy for the applicant. 
Guideline for Certificates and formats:
Family Certificate:
Certificate should be issued by head of the family name.
In case of head of the family is expired, next senior member will be treated as the head of the family. Late member’s name will also be included in the list with note ‘late’ after the name.
Sequence of family members name would be from senior to junior, chronological sequence of date of birth
Relationship to be specified as the relationship among certifying person and other family member as if father is the head of the family, certificate will be issued by father’s name and in the relationship row, father will be specified as ‘Father’, accordingly ‘Son’, ‘Daughter’.
One certificate will not contain two family’s information. Such as, if grandchild and grandmother apply together, they will have two different family certificates, issued by individual head of the family.
Address in the certificate should be correct, as if any of the family member holds Italian residence ship but currently stays in Bangladesh, his/her address should be in Italy.
Marriage Certificate & Nikahnama:
Names details should be matched with other documents
The dates of solemnized and registration to be corresponds in the both certificates
Marriage Affidavit :( Hindu Marriage)
Names details should be matched with other documents
Signature on the marriage Affidavit of husband and wife should be as per their passports.
Signature of priest should be corresponds with his Identification document (National Id card/passport). The copy of identification document should be available with applicant to prove.
Both husband’s and wife/s pictures should be attached on the affidavit paper and the authority seal to be on the picture, seal will cover half on the picture and other half on the paper.
Dependent Certificate:
This certificate is applicable for the parents who are entiled to join their children in Italy.
The certificate should be given by local chairman/commissioner on their pad.
Seal and signature of the chairman/commissioner should be there.
Dependent certificate prepared by lawyer on the stamp paper is also acceptable.
In case of stamp paper, the signature and seal of lawyer should be there and applicant’s picture should be attached and stamped by lawyer’s seal.
Declaration:
This should be self-declaration of applicant certified by local chairman/commissioner.
Applicant’s signature on the declaration should be as per passport.
Affidavit of No Objection:
This document should be on stamp paper and from legal guardian of applicant if applicant is minor and applying without parents.
The letter should be from legal guardian.
Picture of legal guardian and applicant should be on stamp paer and paer will be signed by legal guardian.
Legal guardian’s Identification documents should be available with applicant to verify the signature.
The paper should be signed by advocate along with seal.
Above mentioned documents has to be attested by Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Notarized.
Guideline for preparing family visa documentation
- If there is any change between MRP and hand written passport or any amendment is done in the hand written passport, in that case you have to provide birth certificate, school certificate, voter ID card and self-declaration in support of your name that you are mention in your application.
- Name, Father’s name, Date of birth should be same in all documents. NO exception will be acceptable.
- Prepare a Family certificate according to the format instructed by the embassy. The certificate should be issued by the name of head of the family (Alive). All immediate family members name to be included in the certificate, immediate family includes husband, wife, and children. All relationship to be mentioned clearly. All address in the certificate should be actual and all seals should be clearly visible.
- In case any adopted child is applicant, family certificate will have the word adopted besides his/her name.
- Marriage solemnized date (12 no column of NikahNama) and Marriage registration date (24 no column of NikahNama) should be mentioned in Marriage certificate. Volume no, page no, serial. No. should available in Marriage certificate and
- Nikahnama Bangla and English (All original).
- In case of 2nd marriage; the applicant has to provide necessary first marriage documentation of previous wedding.
- In case of marriage took place over phone/video conference, marriage certificate/nikahnama should contain that information with evidence of kazi’s physical presence.

- Applicant’s passport should contain correct spouse name on the passport. Sponsor’s (spouse) passport also should contain spouse’s correct name if marriage took place before passport issuance.

Italy Visa and Legalization Application Center

Required Documents For Family Reunion Visa(Reunion Ricongiungimnto Familiare)

Requirement List

‘D’ type visa application form fully filled up with applicant Signature (In case applicant is under 18, legal guardian will sign the form)

Passport (MRP) should be valid for 1year and 6 months and with at least two blank pages along with two sets copies of all passports.

Two recent 4.0*3.5 cm size colour photograph’s (white background only). Photo can be taken from photo booth at VFS center

Passports photocopies of sponsor’s who(Nulla Osta sender) (all passports, all pages)

Valid Soggiorno photocopy and Carta d’ Identita attested from Commune/Kostura in Italy

Family certificate from chairman/commissioner according to the embassy format.

Note:

- Family certificate should include all family members. In case of any late member the name should be included with the word ‘late’ after name. Current address should be match with supporting documents of each member. Certificate should be issued by the name of head of the applicant.
- Marriage certificate should be signed by Kazi with signature. Issue and signing by Kazi should be same.
- All Bangladeshi Certificate have to be attested by Ministry of foreign affairs.
- All pages of all the passports of husband/wife must be submitted (Photocopy).If any passport lost; lost declaration from Bangladesh High Commission in Italy or GD from Police Station in Italy is required.
- Marriage certificate, Nikhanama Bangla and English (Muslim), marriage affidavit (Hindu and Buddhist, original National ID card/passport copy of priest to show) ,marriage certificate  from church (Christian).
- All certificates have to be as per embassy guideline.  All Bangladeshi certificates have to be attested from ministry of foreign affairs.
- In No objection affidavit; local guardian will have to mention who will accompany the child to Italy, as same as in theguardian application who lives in Italy.
- In case of spouse visa applicant has to prove that his/her husband/wife came in Bangladesh during marriage ceremony by providing arrival and departure seal in passport photocopy
- All Bangladeshi certificates have to be attested from ministry of foreign affairs. Please check the sign and MOFA code are there in Ministry seal.
Note: Do not use any fluid or overwrite in the documentation. Bring all original documents at the time of submission. Bring original Voter ID or study certificate

Required Documents For Family Reunion Visa(Reunion Ricongiungimnto Familiare)

Requirement List

‘D’ type visa application form fully filled up with applicant Signature (In case applicant is under 18, legal guardian will sign the form)

Passport (MRP) should be valid for 1year and 6 months and with at least two blank pages along with two sets copies of all passports.

Two recent 4.0*3.5 cm size colour photograph’s (white background only). Photo can be taken from photo booth at VFS center

Passports photocopies of sponsor’s who(Nulla Osta sender) (all passports, all pages)

Valid Soggiorno photocopy and Carta d’ Identita attested from Commune/Kostura in Italy

Family certificate from chairman/commissioner according to the embassy format.

Note:

- Family certificate should include all family members. In case of any late member the name should be included with the word ‘late’ after name. Current address should be match with supporting documents of each member. Certificate should be issued by the name of head of the applicant.
- Marriage certificate should be signed by Kazi with signature. Issue and signing by Kazi should be same.
- All Bangladeshi Certificate have to be attested by Ministry of foreign affairs.
- All pages of all the passports of husband/wife must be submitted (Photocopy).If any passport lost; lost declaration from Bangladesh High Commission in Italy or GD from Police Station in Italy is required.
- Marriage certificate, Nikhanama Bangla and English (Muslim), marriage affidavit (Hindu and Buddhist, original National ID card/passport copy of priest to show) ,marriage certificate  from church (Christian).
- All certificates have to be as per embassy guideline.  All Bangladeshi certificates have to be attested from ministry of foreign affairs.
- In No objection affidavit; local guardian will have to mention who will accompany the child to Italy, as same as in theguardian application who lives in Italy.
- In case of spouse visa applicant has to prove that his/her husband/wife came in Bangladesh during marriage ceremony by providing arrival and departure seal in passport photocopy
- All Bangladeshi certificates have to be attested from ministry of foreign affairs. Please check the sign and MOFA code are there in Ministry seal.
Note: Do not use any fluid or overwrite in the documentation. Bring all original documents at the time of submission. Bring original Voter ID or study certificate

## Photo Specifications
Four recent 4.0*3.5 cm size color photograph’s taken in last 6 months (white background only.
